title: LootDrop Plugin
description: Allows admins to spawn loot drop events with customizable loot
body:
# 💰LootDrop Plugin
**The LootDrop Plugin is a server plugin that alllows admins to create a loot drop that drops from the sky at specific coordinates.**
## ✨Features
- **Big Landing:** The crate drops from the sky with a server message to every player
- **Health Bar:** The crate has a visible health bar which can be customized
- **Custom Loot:** You choose exactly what drops when the crate is destroyed (diamonds, gear, etc.) and how rare each item is to drop (in percent)
- **Break the Box:** The loot drops as soon as the health bar of the crate reaches 0 HP

## 🔨 Admin Commands:
```/lootdrop spawn <x> <y> <z> [world]``` Spawns a loot drop at the specific coordinates.

```/lootdrop reload``` Quickly update your config settings after changing the ```config.yml``` file.

```/lootdrop list``` See where all the active loot drops are right now.

> You can customize everything in the ```config.yml``` file in your plugin's folder.

**Get the LootDrop Plugin and start your next big event today!**
